untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom z-score calculation on spread (gamma) between calendar spread pairs with 1-year expiration difference. Z-score formula uses moving average and moving standard deviation not available as named indicators. Additionally, contract selection logic (near/far pair selection by expiration criteria) and rolling mechanics (10 days before expiration) are portfolio-level operations requiring multi-leg instrument handling and custom spread construction logic not supported in this indicator-based rule engine. The signal also has AUTHOR_SILENT parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) that cannot be inferred.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated calendar spread mean reversion strategy that operates on derived spread instruments and requires custom spread construction, z-score computation on synthetic spreads, and multi-leg rolling mechanics. Standard single-instrument technical indicators cannot capture the required logic. A specialized calendar spread backtest engine with spread definition and rolling capabilities would be needed to properly implement this signal.
